name: instant-api — provisioning
description: Success/fail counts for /db/new, /cache/new, /nosql/new, /queue/new, /storage/new, /webhook/new. Source: Custom/Provision/Success and Custom/Provision/Fail metrics emitted by track 3 from the Fiber middleware, plus anonymous-tier recycle counts from worker expire jobs (track 4).

pages.name: Provisioning
pages.description: Resource provisioning health by service and tier

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT (sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) / (sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) + filter(sum(newrelic.timeslice.value), WHERE metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Provision/Fail'))) * 100 AS 'success %' FROM Metric WHERE metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Provision/Success' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'count' FROM Metric WHERE metricTimesliceName IN ('Custom/Provision/Success', 'Custom/Provision/Fail') FACET metricTimesliceName TIMESERIES AUTO

SELECT percentile(duration, 50) * 1000 AS 'median ms', percentile(duration, 95) * 1000 AS 'p95 ms' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND name IN ('POST /db/new', 'POST /cache/new', 'POST /nosql/new', 'POST /queue/new', 'POST /storage/new', 'POST /webhook/new') FACET name TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND level = 'ERROR' AND message LIKE '%provision%' FACET resource_type LIMIT 10
SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) FROM Metric WHERE metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Resource/Expired' TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND message LIKE '%provisioned%' FACET tier
